sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103960" key="*timaiografe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τῑμαιογρᾰφέω</orth>, <sense id="n103960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">write a Timaeus</tr_>, used of Plato by Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:54:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
